name: python_execute
description: Execute Python code for data analysis in an isolated Docker container. The container has pandas, numpy, matplotlib, plotly, scipy, and openpyxl available. Write outputs to /output/ inside the container — files are returned as paths. No network access inside the container.

code.description: Python code to execute. Use /data/ for input files and /output/ for output files.

data_files.description: List of data file paths (relative to FILE_READ_BASE_DIR) to mount at /data/ in the container.

output_files.description: List of files written to /output/ during execution
